scripts.postbuild: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const src=path.join(__dirname,'node_modules','jszip','dist','jszip.min.js');const dst=path.join(__dirname,'dist','jszip.min.js');fs.copyFileSync(src,dst);" && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const src=path.join(__dirname,'node_modules','alpinejs','dist','cdn.min.js');const dst=path.join(__dirname,'dist','alpine.min.js');fs.copyFileSync(src,dst); console.log('copied alpine.min.js');"
